faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.q1: What age groups do you teach?
faqs.a1: We teach students from age 4 to adults. We have specialized programs for each age group.
faqs.a2: Yes, we offer both one-on-one private classes and group sessions based on your preference.
faqs.a3: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee if you're not satisfied with our course.
faqs.a4: Absolutely! You can enroll in multiple courses and we'll help you manage your schedule.
faqs.q5: How do I contact the teachers?
faqs.a5: You can reach out via WhatsApp, email, or through our portal messaging system.

contact.title: Get in Touch
